use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF RELAPSED SMALL CELL LUNG CANCER

indications.text:
HYCAMTIN® capsules are indicated for the treatment of relapsed small cell lung cancer (SCLC) in patients
with a prior complete or partial response and who are at least 45 days from the end of first-line chemotherapy.
